features: 「Material」Our Kraft paper bags are made of Eco-friendly material, recyclable, durable and reusable, odorless, very peace of mind during use.
「Package Includes」You will get 24pcs party paper Bags, Each gift bag measures 16cm x 22cm x 8cm. The surprise gift bag can hold many gifts for kids who take a party at your party.

「Wide Application」The Party goodie bags are widely applicable for Kids Party Holiday Celebrations or other theme parties, Our paper bags are perfect for Christmas, birthday, thanksgiving, Easter and other festival parties, make your party more special and interesting.
「Vibrant Color」Our party bag are in many colors and style, you can use them and other party decorations to decorate your party and build a stylish party atmosphere.
「Nice Shopping」100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE .If you have any problem with the goods you purchased from us, please feel free to contact us and we will solve it for you in 24 hour
